introduction: An inflammatory condition of the operculum or gum flap around a partially erupted/impacted tooth. Common around the lower last molars or wisdom teeth.

features: Soreness and tenderness around partially-erupted tooth

investigations: To establish the position of the affected tooth and its relationship to the second molar

non_drug: Careful irrigation under the gum flap to clear debris, using warm saline mouthwash; To be done frequently until stagnation area is removed
Disimpaction of the third molar by surgical extraction
Extraction of opposing tooth to forestall supraeruption and sequelae
